name: 8x8 Communications Platform API
what_it_does: 8x8 APIs for unified communications (UCaaS) and contact center (CCaaS) platform. Enables AI agents to send SMS/voice messages, query call records, manage contact center interactions, and integrate communication data into workflows. 8x8 provides Video, Voice, Chat, and Contact Center as a Service.
use_cases: Sending SMS and voice notifications from business workflow automation agents
Querying call records and communication analytics from reporting agents
Managing contact center interactions and queue data from CX agents
Integrating voice/video meeting data into operational workflow agents
not_for: Consumer messaging at scale (8x8 is business/enterprise focused)
High-volume consumer SMS campaigns (use Twilio/Plivo for scale)
best_when: A business using 8x8 Work or 8x8 Contact Center wants AI agents to send communications, query interaction history, and integrate UC/CC data into business workflows.
avoid_when: You need consumer-scale messaging. PRIVACY: Business communication data including call recordings requires careful handling.

auth.notes: 8x8 uses OAuth 2.0 for platform APIs and API keys for messaging APIs. Developer portal for app registration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; business subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: 8x8 Work and 8x8 Contact Center plans; messaging priced per message
pricing.notes: Business UCaaS/CCaaS platform. Messaging API pricing separate from platform subscription.

performance.rate_limits: 8x8 API: rate limits per product and endpoint

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Business call recordings and communication data are sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
8x8 has separate API products (messaging, video, contact center) — unified access varies
OAuth and API key auth differ by product line — verify auth method per endpoint
High-volume messaging requires messaging-specific API keys, not platform OAuth
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Business communications data including voice recordings. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2 and API key auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Business communications with call recordings and PII. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2 + API keys.
